rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0003
rows.name:
I couldn't believe it until I saw it myself,
but it seems it was true after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Different from the Bias...
another type of alien[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0006
rows.name: What are you going to do if we are Earthlings?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0007
rows.name: Annihilate. That's our duty as Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Earthlings are like cancer cells
that have appeared in this universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0012
rows.name:
That's quite the selfish logic. Is
that why you destroyed the Life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0013
rows.name: You call this thing the Life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0014
rows.name:
So primitive. You're using
pretty outdated technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, fine. This thing and all
you Earthlings will be erased.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0016
rows.name: That's our Growth logic. Growth's justice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0017
rows.name: Then we'll just stick to our logic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04090100_MSG0018
rows.name:
Good. You'll be worth killing. Much more than
those guys who are just sleeping![ST:wait ]
